title: Custom Music Discs RP
description: Enhancing Your Minecraft Soundtrack, One Disc at a Time
body:
![Custom Music Discs - Recent Update Banner](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/7f3be4_ad7ab60325494ec780ef9744e28a4d94~mv2.png)

# 🎶 Custom Music Discs (CMD)

Welcome to **Custom Music Discs** – your ultimate upgrade for in-game audio!  
This **Datapack + Resource Pack combo** adds **100+ unique custom music discs** into your Minecraft world, fully integrated with Survival gameplay. Discover, collect, and vibe to new tracks as you explore – all with seamless installation and beautiful design.

![Use Code SMHEROBRINE ON KCBHOSTING](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c92ceb479dc107071b138abef35936dcd164147c.png)

[OR CLICK HERE](https://kcbhosting.com/aff/SMHerobrine)



> ⚠️ **Reminder:**  
> CMD has two parts: the **Datapack (DP)** and the **Resource Pack (RP)**.  
> You **must install both** for it to work correctly.  
> 👉 [Download the Datapack here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/custom-music-discs-dp)

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎵 Over 100+ Custom Music Discs  
Find and collect brand-new discs across the Minecraft world — hidden in structures, dropped by mobs, traded by villagers, or crafted. Every disc comes with its own handpicked music track.

### 🖌️ Visual Upgrades for All Discs  
We’ve retextured every vanilla disc to match the style of our custom discs, creating a unified and immersive jukebox experience.

### 🌱 Disc Progression Tree  
Track your collection progress with our in-game advancement system. Unlock milestones, explore new music, and work toward the ultimate reward:  
**Sweden (Hans Zimmer Edition) (slowed + reverb)** 🎁

### 📚 In-Game Wiki *(NEW in CMD v7)*  
Thanks to Minecraft 1.21.6's new Dialog system, you can now browse a built-in CMD Wiki directly in-game!  
Learn where to find each disc — no external tabs needed.

### 🧩 Easy & Seamless Installation  
No complicated setups. Just drop the files in and go! Fully compatible with most vanilla-friendly datapacks.

### 🧭 Survival-Friendly
Every disc is obtainable through natural gameplay — no commands or cheats required.

### 📅 Regular Updates  
CMD is constantly evolving with new content, improvements, and **community-requested songs**.  

---

## 💬 Get Involved!

We love hearing from players and the community. Whether you're reporting a bug, requesting a new track, or just showing off your builds — we’re all ears!

- 🐞 Submit bugs or issues
- 🎧 Request a new disc
- 💡 Give us your feedback 

[All through the Curseforge Issues page!](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/custom-music-discs-rp/issues)

---

## 📢 Join Our Community

🎉 Want update previews, dev news, and a place to share your ideas?

👉 **[Join our CMD Discord Server](https://discord.gg/QtcjrEXKDs)**  
You’ll get access to exclusive info, early teases, and a direct line to the CMD team.
